subtitle: Marie Cooksey on leave; James Salas Guillen away until 18 June; DTP1092 comments need action
context: Marie Cooksey is on annual leave 8-13 June and has left multiple unresponded comments on DTP1092 - College Staff in PXD Proposal since 4 June that require your review and action. James Salas Guillen is on annual leave from end of Friday 5 June, returning Thursday 18 June, leaving H&S Cority data work and DSE system monitoring without primary coverage - his handover document outlines outstanding items you and Chris must manage. The Bi-monthly CDR/PD working group meeting scheduled for 9 June via Lindsey Spriggs may not be needed pending confirmation. Julie Hickman responded 4 June to Marie's volunteer reporting query but no follow-up action has been taken. Multiple Access Support cases (68981549, 68981507, 68981820) are active and require monitoring. You should open the H&S Handover email from James Salas Guillen first to understand coverage gaps and blocking dependencies.

urgent.title: H&S Handover - James Salas Guillen
urgent.sub: James on leave until 18 June. Read handover document to identify outstanding items, Cority data work, and DSE system monitoring that you and Chris must cover. This blocks continuation of H&S administration work.
urgent.subject: H&S Handover

urgent.title: DTP1092 - Marie Cooksey comments
urgent.sub: Marie on leave 8-13 June. Multiple unresponded comments left 4-5 June on College Staff in PXD Proposal project. You replied 4 June but comment thread requires completion independent of Marie's return.
urgent.subject: Marie Cooksey left a comment in "DTP1092 - College Staff in PXD Proposal"
